name: wstdiem-loop-manager
description: Operator CLI for monitoring and safely simulating wstDIEM loop positions.

scripts.test:contracts:fork:required: node -e "if (!process.env.BASE_RPC_URL) { console.error('BASE_RPC_URL is required'); process.exit(1); }" && forge test --match-path 'test/foundry/*Fork.t.sol'
scripts.deploy:executor:dry-run: node -e "if (!process.env.BASE_RPC_URL) { console.error('BASE_RPC_URL is required'); process.exit(1); }" && forge script script/DeployLoopExecutor.s.sol:DeployLoopExecutor --fork-url "$BASE_RPC_URL"
scripts.readiness:owner: node scripts/validate-live-evidence-env.mjs && npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js --json loop readiness --owner "$WSTDIEM_FORK_OWNER" --loop-executor "$WSTDIEM_FORK_LOOP_EXECUTOR" --strict-evidence
